sourceTitle: How marketing teams can use Notion AI to boost productivity

questions.question: Which three actions does Notion AI provide to improve written content?

options.explanation: These are the three specific functions mentioned for improving written content.
Translation, formatting, and publishing are not listed as Notion AI’s content‑improvement features.
Those actions are unrelated to the AI capabilities described in the article.
While useful, these functions are not the ones highlighted for written‑content assistance.

questions.question: What Notion AI tool helps extract key information from databases?

options.explanation: The article specifically calls out AI autofill as the tool for pulling key data from databases.
AI filter is not mentioned; the correct tool is AI autofill.
Sorting is a separate function and not described as a data‑extraction feature.
Exporting data is not the functionality highlighted for extracting key information.

questions.question: How does the AI‑powered Q&A search benefit marketing teams?

options.text: It saves time by quickly locating information without disturbing colleagues.
options.explanation: The Q&A search is designed to find specific workspace info fast, reducing the need to interrupt teammates.

options.text: It increases the storage capacity of the workspace.
options.explanation: Search does not affect storage size; it only retrieves existing content.
Automation of posting is outside the scope of the Q&A search feature.

options.text: It generates graphics for campaign reports.
options.explanation: Graphic generation is not a function of the Q&A search.

questions.question: Where can users find templates to start using Notion AI?

options.explanation: The article directs readers to browse over 10,000 templates in the Template gallery.
The Help Center provides support articles, not a collection of templates.
YouTube hosts videos, not the template library.

options.text: Directly in the AI settings panel
options.explanation: Templates are accessed via the gallery, not from AI settings.

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT mentioned as a way Notion AI can boost productivity for marketing teams?

options.explanation: The article does not list email‑campaign automation as an AI capability.
Editing is explicitly mentioned as a content‑improvement feature.
Summarization is one of the three content‑enhancement options.
AI autofill for extracting database information is described in the guide.

questions.question: If a marketing team wants to summarize a campaign report using Notion AI, which prompt is most likely to produce the desired result?

options.text: Summarize the key findings of this campaign report in bullet points.
options.explanation: A clear request for a summary with a specific format (bullet points) aligns with the AI’s summarization capability.

options.text: Rewrite this report in a formal tone.
options.explanation: This prompt asks for rewriting, not summarizing.

options.text: Extract all numbers from the report.
options.explanation: Extracting numbers is a data‑extraction task, not a summary.

options.text: Create a new campaign based on the report.
options.explanation: Generating a new campaign goes beyond the summarization function highlighted in the article.

questions.question: According to the article, what should a user do if an ad blocker prevents the video from playing?

options.explanation: The article provides a direct link to the YouTube version of the video as the workaround.
Disabling the AI does not affect video playback; the suggested action is to use YouTube.
While support could help, the article explicitly recommends watching the video on YouTube.
Refreshing does not bypass the ad blocker; the article points to the YouTube link.

questions.question: How might AI autofill change the workflow when dealing with large customer databases?

options.text: It allows marketers to quickly pull out essential customer insights without manual scanning, streamlining analysis.
options.explanation: AI autofill extracts key information automatically, reducing the time spent manually reviewing large datasets.

options.text: It automatically sends personalized emails to every customer.
options.explanation: Sending emails is not a function of AI autofill; the tool only extracts information.

options.text: It replaces the need for any human oversight in data interpretation.
options.explanation: While it speeds up extraction, human judgment is still required to interpret and act on the data.

options.text: It generates visual dashboards automatically from the database.
options.explanation: Dashboard creation is not mentioned as a capability of AI autofill in the guide.
